# CodeLens Routing Policy

Authoritative routing table, kept in sync with `crates/codelens-mcp/src/routing_policy.rs`. Regenerate via `cargo test -p codelens-mcp routing_policy` when the Rust table changes.

| Task shape | Lane | Rationale |
| --- | --- | --- |
| simple local lookup / single-file edit (<30 LOC) | `native` | Native Read/Grep is faster and bypasses CodeLens warm-up cost. |
| multi-file review or impact analysis | `codelens_after_bootstrap` | Switch to CodeLens workflow tools after the first concrete local step for bounded blast-radius reports. |
| refactor preflight (rename / extract / move) | `codelens_after_bootstrap` | Use verify_change_readiness + safe_rename_report before mutation tools. |
| onboarding / planning an unfamiliar repo | `codelens_after_bootstrap` | onboard_project + get_ranked_context give better context-per-token than ad-hoc grep. |
| long-running analysis (dead_code, module_boundary) | `async_analysis` | Use start_analysis_job + poll, not synchronous workflow tools; avoids blocking the session. |
